subtasks.what_to_do: Use two colors of paper (red and blue). Red = clap hands, blue = jump.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold up red paper, wait for clap. Hold up blue, wait for jump. Repeat 3 times.

subtasks.what_to_do: On used paper, draw red dot, blue dot, red dot. Point to each.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child claps (red) or jumps (blue). Smile after correct sequence.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw a 5-step code (red, red, blue, red, blue) on scrap paper.
subtasks.how_they_help: Stand back. If mistake, point to dot again. Clap when finished.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw tower pattern: red block, blue block, red block. Use colored stones/buttons.
subtasks.how_they_help: Give 6 stones (3 red, 3 blue). Child copies tower. Compare drawing.

subtasks.what_to_do: Assign clap = A, jump = B. Write 'A B A' on paper.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child performs clap, jump, clap. Then tries own initial.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw 3 strips: red, blue, red. Say 'The cat sat' is this code (by pointing).
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to each strip. Child writes or signs 3-word story back.

subtasks.what_to_do: Hide coin under cushion. Write 'red = go to sofa, blue = look under cushion.'
subtasks.how_they_help: Hand code paper. Walk behind silently. Celebrate when found.

subtasks.what_to_do: Give green leaf or scrap. Say 'Invent a new symbol for Dad.'
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws symbol (e.g., star). You nod and use it next time.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child writes 4-step code for you using simple drawings.
subtasks.how_they_help: You perform wrong action. Child corrects by pointing. Then you do correctly.

subtasks.what_to_do: Line up 5 cups with red/blue dots. Give red/blue buttons/seeds.
subtasks.how_they_help: Use water clock or slow count. Child sorts into matching cups. Repeat to beat time.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place toy on white paper near sunny window.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold paper steady. Child traces shadow with pencil. You demonstrate first.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use candle/oil lamp or strong sunlight on wall.
subtasks.how_they_help: Model dog shadow with hands. Child tries rabbit, bird. Applaud each.

subtasks.what_to_do: Toy 10 cm from wall. Move light source closer and farther.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child moves light → shadow grows. Moves away → shrinks. Ask 'Big or small?' Child points.

subtasks.what_to_do: Roll ball slowly across floor near wall with sunlight.
subtasks.how_they_help: You draw shadow at start. Child draws middle. You draw end. Compare.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use small mirror or shiny lid. Tape to book. Reflect sunlight.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child angles mirror to reflect light onto wall. Moves mirror to move shadow. Clap.

subtasks.what_to_do: Stick pencil upright in clay/mud on sunny windowsill.
subtasks.how_they_help: 9 AM mark shadow. 10 AM another stone. 11 AM another.

subtasks.what_to_do: Cut tree shape from cardboard. Tape to stick.
subtasks.how_they_help: Sunlight behind white sheet. Child moves puppet for 10-sec silent story.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place three toys: tall bottle, flat book, small ball.
subtasks.how_they_help: Ask 'Which shadow longest?' Child guesses. Test with same light. Compare.

subtasks.what_to_do: Wrap red cloth over flashlight or use colored glass.
subtasks.how_they_help: Shine on white paper. Child places toy → colored shadow. Then blue. Child names colors.

subtasks.what_to_do: Same cup on same windowsill at different times.
subtasks.how_they_help: 9 AM child draws shadow. 12 PM different color. 3 PM third color. Compare.

cannot_hear.main_task_name: Wednesday: Indoor Obstacle with Visual Cues

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw living room: mat, table, chair. Mark 5 obstacles.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to furniture. Child draws shapes. Then mark pillow, book.

subtasks.what_to_do: Write on scraps: CRAWL, HOP, SPIN, CLAP, FREEZE.
subtasks.how_they_help: You write CRAWL. Child copies or draws stick figure.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place START at door, END at window. Command cards between.
subtasks.how_they_help: Walk course first. Child watches. Then child walks.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place note 'DRAW A TRIANGLE' in middle.
subtasks.how_they_help: Keep slate nearby. Child stops, draws triangle, shows you, continues.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use sand timer or count heartbeats.
subtasks.how_they_help: Start at first obstacle. Stop at END. Show time with claps or fingers.

subtasks.what_to_do: Move two command cards closer (HOP then SPIN side by side).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child runs again. Compare time. If faster, high five.

subtasks.what_to_do: Put rope or drawn line on floor between obstacles.
subtasks.how_they_help: Demonstrate walking on line. Child copies. If falls, restart segment.

subtasks.what_to_do: Write 'Touch line → go back 2 steps.'
subtasks.how_they_help: Child runs. If touches line, point to line and back 2 steps. Child corrects.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child rearranges command cards. Gestures for you to run.
subtasks.how_they_help: You pretend not to understand. Child points to each card. You do action.

subtasks.what_to_do: Make course for stuffed toy with only 3 actions.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child sets HOP, CLAP, FREEZE. Moves toy's limbs through course.

subtasks.what_to_do: Clear cup with 2 spoons baking soda.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child pours ½ cup vinegar slowly. Watch bubbles. Child touches.

subtasks.what_to_do: Cup ½ water, 2 spoons oil, 3 drops food color.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child shakes gently. Watch layers. Point to line. Child draws.

subtasks.what_to_do: 4 bowls: flour, salt, sugar, baking soda.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child adds 1 spoon vinegar to each. Only baking soda fizzes. Point. Child circles.

subtasks.what_to_do: Tall glass: honey, dish soap, water, oil slowly.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child watches layers. Point to each. Child draws with colors.

subtasks.what_to_do: Dissolve 3 spoons salt in warm water. Hang string on pencil.
subtasks.how_they_help: Windowsill 2 days. Day 3 child sees crystals. Point.

subtasks.what_to_do: Freeze toy in ice. Two bowls: hot water, cold water.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child drops ice in each. Watches which melts first. Point. Child records.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child dips swab in lemon juice. Writes word on paper.
subtasks.how_they_help: Dry 10 min. Hold near warm bulb. Brown writing appears. You sign.

subtasks.what_to_do: Plastic bottle: 2 spoons baking soda, ½ cup vinegar, 2 drops soap.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child watches foam eruption. Point. Child claps.

subtasks.what_to_do: Two cups: hot water, cold water. One sugar cube each.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child drops both. Watches which dissolves first. Count slowly. Child points.

subtasks.what_to_do: Blank paper and crayons.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws 4 boxes: volcano, oil+water, fizz test, crystals. Draws arrows.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw 5 pictures: wake, breakfast, play, dinner, sleep.
subtasks.how_they_help: Mix drawings. Child arranges order. Nod or shake head. Child corrects.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fold paper into 6 panels. Draw your morning.
subtasks.how_they_help: You draw panel 1. Child draws panels 2–6.

subtasks.what_to_do: Cards: HAPPY, SAD, ANGRY, SCARED.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold HAPPY → smile. SAD → frown. ANGRY → stomp. SCARED → hug self.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child acts short story: 'I lost my shoe and found it'.
subtasks.how_they_help: No recording. Child repeats. Adds paper title cards.

subtasks.what_to_do: Favorite story scene. Act 10 seconds.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child acts silently. You guess. If wrong, repeat with bigger gesture.

subtasks.what_to_do: Stack 4 notes: happy, sad, angry, surprised.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child flips fast. Faces move. Say 'Show me surprised' → child finds.

subtasks.what_to_do: Write letter using only drawings.
subtasks.how_they_help: You provide paper. Child draws sun (good day), rain (sad), heart (love).

subtasks.what_to_do: 10 objects: spoon, shoe, cup, book, key, sock, ball, comb, pencil, stone.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child picks 5 and tells story by moving objects. Watch and nod.

subtasks.what_to_do: Retell same story using only body movements.
subtasks.how_they_help: You pretend to be other character. Child gestures. You gesture back.

subtasks.what_to_do: Invent 'The Quiet Monster'.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws monster. Acts how it walks, eats, sleeps. You copy actions.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fold paper in half. Paint on one side only.
subtasks.how_they_help: Fold again and press. Open to see mirror image. Point to both sides.

subtasks.what_to_do: Build half a stone/stick tower (left side only).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child mirrors same objects on right side. Check. Point to mismatch.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw vertical line. Left half of a face.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws right half to match. Nod or point to fix.

subtasks.what_to_do: Small mirror or still water in bowl.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child looks in mirror and writes name so it looks correct in mirror.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fold paper twice. Cut small shapes from edges.
subtasks.how_they_help: Unfold. Symmetrical pattern. Count matching sides together.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw line on tray. 10 small pebbles/beans.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child places 3 left. Mirrors on right. Check. Repeat with 5.

subtasks.what_to_do: Stand facing child like a mirror.
subtasks.how_they_help: You raise right hand. Child raises left. Touch nose → opposite hand.

subtasks.what_to_do: Find 5 things same on both sides.
subtasks.how_they_help: Walk together. Child points to plate, cup, book, spoon, window. Nod.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fold paper. Draw half monster on fold.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child cuts or traces other half. Opens. Two-headed monster. Clap.

subtasks.what_to_do: Two small mirrors at 90° (or polished lids).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child puts small toy between. Sees infinite reflections. Count toys.

cannot_hear.main_task_name: Sunday: Vibration & Rhythm (Visualized Sound – No Speaker)

subtasks.what_to_do: Metal pot on table. Child puts hand on table near pot.
subtasks.how_they_help: Tap pot hard with spoon. Feel vibration. Stop. Feel nothing. Compare.

subtasks.what_to_do: Plastic wrap over bowl. Sprinkle rice on top.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child taps bowl from below. Rice jumps. Point to jumping rice.

subtasks.what_to_do: Rubber bands over shoebox.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child plucks. Sees band vibrate. Draw wavy line for 'vibration'.

subtasks.what_to_do: Two cups with string through bottom.
subtasks.how_they_help: Pull string tight. Child feels cup vibrate when you pluck string.

subtasks.what_to_do: Tap table pattern: tap, tap, pause, tap.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child watches your hand. Copies pattern. Nod. Increase length.

subtasks.what_to_do: 3 glasses different water levels.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child taps each. Sees water move. Point to high vs low water.

subtasks.what_to_do: Blow up balloon. Hold near child's cheek.
subtasks.how_they_help: You hum (child cannot hear). Child feels balloon vibrate on cheek.

subtasks.what_to_do: Collect 3 items: spoon, metal pan, plastic bowl.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child taps each and feels vibration. Records with drawing.

subtasks.what_to_do: Metal spoon and plastic spoon. Tap both on table.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child feels both. Points to which vibrates longer (metal). Write it.

subtasks.what_to_do: Large pot on floor. Child stands barefoot.
subtasks.how_they_help: Tap pot with stick. Child feels floor vibration. Invents dance move.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw or cut pictures: water, food, toilet, sleep, play, hurt, help, want, yes, no.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold each finished card; child nods.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child holds up 'water' card. You bring water.
subtasks.how_they_help: Wait for child to initiate; do not prompt verbally.

subtasks.what_to_do: Show 'play' and 'sleep'. Child points to one.
subtasks.how_they_help: Do activity child chose immediately.

subtasks.what_to_do: Offer disliked food. Child holds up 'no'.
subtasks.how_they_help: Remove food; nod respectfully.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place 'want' + 'water' in sequence.
subtasks.how_they_help: Clap; bring water.

subtasks.what_to_do: Hold 'hurt' card, then point to body part.
subtasks.how_they_help: Check part; give bandage if needed.

subtasks.what_to_do: Hold 'sad' after dropping toy.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hug child; help pick up toy.

subtasks.what_to_do: Try to open jar, fail, hold up 'help'.
subtasks.how_they_help: Open jar; thumbs up.

subtasks.what_to_do: Show 'play' to sibling. Sibling starts game.
subtasks.how_they_help: Sibling obeys card without speaking.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw new card (e.g., 'outside'). Show you.
subtasks.how_they_help: Learn the card; use it next time.

subtasks.what_to_do: Show red paper = clap. Blue paper = jump.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold red; child claps. Blue; child jumps.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw red, blue, red dots. Point to first.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to each dot; smile when child performs.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw red, red, blue, red, blue on note. Hand to child.
subtasks.how_they_help: Stand back; if mistake, point to dot again.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw red block, blue block, red block. Give 6 blocks.
subtasks.how_they_help: Compare drawing to tower; nod or shake head.

subtasks.what_to_do: Write 'A B A' on paper. Clap=A, jump=B.
subtasks.how_they_help: Demonstrate once; child performs clap,jump,clap.

subtasks.what_to_do: Hide coin. Write 'red=sofa, blue=cushion'.
subtasks.how_they_help: Walk behind silently; celebrate when found.

subtasks.what_to_do: Give green paper. Gesture 'invent symbol for Dad'.
subtasks.how_they_help: Nod; use symbol next time.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child writes 4-step code. You pretend not to understand.
subtasks.how_they_help: Perform wrong action; child corrects by pointing.

subtasks.what_to_do: Line 5 cups with dots. Child sorts buttons. Sibling counts.
subtasks.how_they_help: Sibling shows count; child races.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw red=clap, blue=jump, green=spin on poster.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hang poster; family uses for morning warm-up.

cannot_speak.main_task_name: Wednesday: Shadow Physics & Light Play (Family, No Speaking)

subtasks.what_to_do: Place toy on white paper near sunny window. Trace shadow.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold paper steady; trace one corner as example.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use sunlight or candle. Each makes hand shadow.
subtasks.how_they_help: You make dog; child bird; sibling rabbit.

subtasks.what_to_do: Toy 10 cm from wall. Move light closer/away.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to big shadow; point to small shadow.

subtasks.what_to_do: Roll ball slowly near wall with light.
subtasks.how_they_help: You draw start; child middle; sibling end.

subtasks.what_to_do: Stick pencil in clay on sunny sill.
subtasks.how_they_help: 9 AM child marks; 10 AM sibling; 11 AM you.

subtasks.what_to_do: Cut shapes from cardboard. Tape to sticks. Light on sheet.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each moves puppet; child directs with pointing.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place tall bottle, flat book, small ball. Each guesses.
subtasks.how_they_help: Write guesses; test; child points to winner.

subtasks.what_to_do: Wrap red cloth over light. Then blue.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each puts hand in colored shadow; child names color.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw each family member's shadow at 12 PM.
subtasks.how_they_help: Stand still; child draws.

subtasks.what_to_do: Same cup on sill. Each draws at different hour.
subtasks.how_they_help: You 9 AM; child 12 PM; sibling 3 PM; compare.

subtasks.what_to_do: 2 spoons baking soda in cup. Pour ½ cup vinegar.
subtasks.how_they_help: Family watches bubbles; everyone claps.

subtasks.what_to_do: ½ water, 2 spoons oil, 3 drops color. Shake.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each points to line between oil and water.

subtasks.what_to_do: 4 bowls: flour, salt, sugar, baking soda. Add vinegar.
subtasks.how_they_help: Family points to fizzes; child circles it.

subtasks.what_to_do: Tall glass: honey, dish soap, water, oil slowly.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each points to layer; child names order.

subtasks.what_to_do: Dissolve 3 spoons salt in warm water. Hang string.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each morning family looks; child points to crystals.

subtasks.what_to_do: Freeze toy in ice. Two bowls: hot water, cold water.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each points to which melts first; child records.

subtasks.what_to_do: Write with lemon juice. Dry. Near bulb, word appears.
subtasks.how_they_help: Family reads word together (silently or signs).

subtasks.what_to_do: Bottle: baking soda, vinegar, 2 drops soap.
subtasks.how_they_help: Family watches foam climb; child claps.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw 4 experiments on one paper.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each points to favorite; child adds star.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child blindfolded. Family puts sugar, salt, lemon on tongue.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws happy or sad face; family laughs.

cannot_speak.main_task_name: Friday: Visual Storytelling – Family Story Night

subtasks.what_to_do: Gesture 'Draw a happy time with our family.'
subtasks.how_they_help: Give paper and crayons; do not guide.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw 5 mixed birthday pictures. Child puts in order.
subtasks.how_they_help: Family watches; nod when correct.

subtasks.what_to_do: Act 'no running inside' (walk slowly, point to floor).
subtasks.how_they_help: Family guesses; clap when correct.

subtasks.what_to_do: You act: 'Baby cried. Mom hugged. Baby smiled.'
subtasks.how_they_help: Repeat twice; child draws three parts.

subtasks.what_to_do: Act simple joke (slip on banana, shrug).
subtasks.how_they_help: Family laughs; child bows.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw rules: no yelling (finger on lips), take turns.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hang on wall; child points when needed.

subtasks.what_to_do: Act Grandma (slow walk, glasses, knitting).
subtasks.how_they_help: Give clue card if stuck (e.g., 'old' drawing).

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw on strips: 'Thank you Mom', 'Thank you Dad'. Glue chain.
subtasks.how_they_help: You write words if needed; child draws picture.

subtasks.what_to_do: Bring Dad's hat. Show how used (put on head).
subtasks.how_they_help: Family watches; child points to who uses it.

subtasks.what_to_do: Family acts scene (waking, eating, going out). Child directs.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child points to each person; you hold camera if possible.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fold paper in half. Paint one side. You press.
subtasks.how_they_help: Open together; both point to mirror image.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child builds left half stone tower. Sibling mirrors right.
subtasks.how_they_help: You check; point to mismatch; sibling fixes.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws left half face. You draw right half.
subtasks.how_they_help: Compare; child thumbs up/down.

subtasks.what_to_do: Write name backward. Hold to mirror. Family reads correct.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each signs the name.

subtasks.what_to_do: Each folds paper twice, cuts shapes. Unfold.
subtasks.how_they_help: Compare snowflakes; child points to matching sides.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw line on tray. Child 3 pebbles left. You mirror right.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child checks; thumbs up or corrects.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child raises right hand. You raise left. Swap.
subtasks.how_they_help: Laugh when wrong; try again.

subtasks.what_to_do: Each finds one symmetrical object. Child collects.
subtasks.how_they_help: Walk together; child points; you nod.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fold paper. Draw half monster on fold. Open.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each suggests name (writes/signs); child picks.

subtasks.what_to_do: Two mirrors/lids facing 90°. Small toy between.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each counts visible toys; child writes number.

cannot_speak.main_task_name: Sunday: Vibration & Rhythm – Family Feel the Beat

subtasks.what_to_do: Metal pot on table. Each puts hand on table.
subtasks.how_they_help: Take turns; child points to strongest feel.

subtasks.what_to_do: Plastic wrap over bowl. Sprinkle rice. Tap from below.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child watches whose tap makes rice jump highest.

subtasks.what_to_do: Rubber bands over shoebox. Each plucks.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child points to whose finger sees most vibration.

subtasks.what_to_do: Two cups with string. Two pull tight. Third plucks.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child feels cup; family rotates roles.

subtasks.what_to_do: You tap: tap,tap,pause,tap. Child copies. Child leads.
subtasks.how_they_help: Family takes turns leading; all watch hands.

subtasks.what_to_do: 3 glasses different water. Each taps.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child points to biggest water ripple.

subtasks.what_to_do: Balloon. Hold to cheek humming (child feels). Then child's cheek.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child points to who smiled first.

subtasks.what_to_do: Each picks item (spoon, pan, bowl). Taps and feels.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws; family watches.

subtasks.what_to_do: Metal spoon and plastic spoon. Each taps both.
subtasks.how_they_help: Family points to longer vibration; child writes winner.

subtasks.what_to_do: Large pot on floor. Family stands barefoot circle.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each invents dance move for strong beat; child copies.

cannot_hear_nor_speak.main_task_name: Monday: Visual Schedule & Daily Routine Board

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw or cut 5 pictures: wake, breakfast, brush teeth, play, sleep.
subtasks.how_they_help: Give old magazines or blank paper. Let them choose.

subtasks.what_to_do: Put pictures in order from morning to night on big paper.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to sun for morning, moon for night. Let them arrange.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw small clock or number (like 7) next to each picture.
subtasks.how_they_help: Show watch. Help write number if needed.

subtasks.what_to_do: Hang schedule on wall. Each morning point to first picture and do it.
subtasks.how_they_help: Finish task → put stone/sticker next to it. Clap.

subtasks.what_to_do: Change order of two pictures (play before breakfast). Fix it.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to wrong order. Let child move pictures.

subtasks.what_to_do: Add new picture (water plants or feed pet).
subtasks.how_they_help: Give blank card. Child draws. Nod.

subtasks.what_to_do: Special day (birthday). Draw temporary picture and add.
subtasks.how_they_help: Show calendar. Tape new picture on top for that day.

subtasks.what_to_do: End of day: move all pictures to 'done' envelope.
subtasks.how_they_help: You hold envelope. Child drops each in one by one.

subtasks.what_to_do: Teach younger sibling or toy how to use schedule.
subtasks.how_they_help: Watch silently. Child points to each picture and shows toy.

subtasks.what_to_do: Make weekly schedule (Monday to Sunday).
subtasks.how_they_help: Give 7 papers. Draw or tape pictures. Hang in a row.

cannot_hear_nor_speak.main_task_name: Tuesday: Color Action Game (No Sound, No Speech)

subtasks.what_to_do: Red paper = clap. Blue paper = jump. Demonstrate.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold red → child claps. Blue → child jumps.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw red, blue, red dots. Point to first.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to each dot; smile when child performs.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw red, red, blue, red, blue on sticky note.
subtasks.how_they_help: Stand back. If mistake, point to dot again.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw red block, blue block, red block. Give 6 blocks.
subtasks.how_they_help: Compare tower to drawing. Nod or shake head.

subtasks.what_to_do: Clap=A, jump=B. Write 'A B A'.
subtasks.how_they_help: Do actions once. Child copies.

subtasks.what_to_do: Hide coin. Write 'red=sofa, blue=cushion'.
subtasks.how_they_help: Walk behind silently. Clap when found.

subtasks.what_to_do: Give green paper. Gesture 'new symbol for Dad'.
subtasks.how_they_help: Nod. Use symbol next time.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child writes 4-step code. You do wrong action.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child points to fix. Then do correctly. Clap.

subtasks.what_to_do: 5 cups with dots. Sort buttons. Sibling counts slowly.
subtasks.how_they_help: Sibling shows finger count. Child races.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw poster: red=clap, blue=jump. Hang on wall.
subtasks.how_they_help: Family uses poster for morning actions together.

cannot_hear_nor_speak.main_task_name: Wednesday: Shadow Play with Family (No Hearing, No Speech)

subtasks.what_to_do: Toy on white paper near sunny window. Trace shadow.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold paper. Trace one corner as example.

subtasks.what_to_do: Sunlight or lamp. Make dog shadow. Child tries bird.
subtasks.how_they_help: Take turns. Clap for each.

subtasks.what_to_do: Toy 10 cm from wall. Move light closer/away.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to big shadow. Point to small shadow.

subtasks.what_to_do: Roll ball slowly near wall with light.
subtasks.how_they_help: You draw start. Child middle. Sibling end.

subtasks.what_to_do: Pencil in clay on sunny sill.
subtasks.how_they_help: 9 AM child marks. 10 AM sibling. 11 AM you.

subtasks.what_to_do: Cardboard shapes on sticks. Light on sheet.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each moves puppet. Child points to direct.

subtasks.what_to_do: Tall bottle, flat book, small ball. Each guesses longest shadow.
subtasks.how_they_help: Write guesses. Test. Child points to winner.

subtasks.what_to_do: Red plastic over light. Then blue.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each puts hand in colored shadow. Child points to color card.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw each family member's shadow at 12 PM.
subtasks.how_they_help: Stand still. Child draws.

subtasks.what_to_do: Same cup on sill all day.
subtasks.how_they_help: You 9 AM. Child 12 PM. Sibling 3 PM. Compare.

cannot_hear_nor_speak.main_task_name: Thursday: Kitchen Science with Family (No Words)

subtasks.what_to_do: 2 spoons baking soda in cup. Pour ½ cup vinegar.
subtasks.how_they_help: Family watches bubbles. All clap.

subtasks.what_to_do: ½ water, 2 spoons oil, 3 drops color. Shake.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each points to line between oil and water.

subtasks.what_to_do: 4 bowls: flour, salt, sugar, baking soda. Add vinegar.
subtasks.how_they_help: Family points to fizzes. Child circles it.

subtasks.what_to_do: Tall glass: honey, dish soap, water, oil slowly.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each points to one layer. Child points to numbers for order.

subtasks.what_to_do: 3 spoons salt in warm water. Hang string.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each morning family looks. Child points to crystals.

subtasks.what_to_do: Freeze toy in ice. Hot water vs cold water.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each points to which melts first. Child writes answer.

subtasks.what_to_do: Write with lemon juice. Dry. Near bulb, word appears.
subtasks.how_they_help: Family reads word (signs or writes).

subtasks.what_to_do: Bottle: baking soda, vinegar, 2 drops soap.
subtasks.how_they_help: Family watches foam climb. Child claps.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw all 4 experiments on one big paper.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each points to favorite. Child puts star on it.

subtasks.what_to_do: Blindfold child. Family puts sugar, salt, lemon on tongue.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws happy or sad face. Family laughs.

cannot_hear_nor_speak.main_task_name: Friday: Family Story with No Words (No Hearing, No Speech)

subtasks.what_to_do: Motion to draw a happy time with family.
subtasks.how_they_help: Give crayons. Do not guide.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw 5 mixed birthday pictures. Put in order.
subtasks.how_they_help: Family watches. Nod when correct.

subtasks.what_to_do: Act 'no running inside' (walk slow, point to floor).
subtasks.how_they_help: Family guesses. Clap when correct.

subtasks.what_to_do: You act: 'Baby cried. Mom hugged. Baby smiled.'
subtasks.how_they_help: Do twice. Child draws three parts.

subtasks.what_to_do: Act simple joke (slip on banana, shrug).
subtasks.how_they_help: Family laughs. Child bows.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw family rules: finger on lips, point to self then sibling.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hang poster. Child points when rule broken.

subtasks.what_to_do: Act Grandma (slow walk, glasses, knitting).
subtasks.how_they_help: Family guesses. If stuck, show clue drawing of old person.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw on strips: 'Thank you Mom', 'Thank you Dad'. Glue chain.
subtasks.how_they_help: You write words if needed. Child draws pictures.

subtasks.what_to_do: Bring Dad's hat. Show how used (put on head).
subtasks.how_they_help: Family watches. Child points to who uses it.

subtasks.what_to_do: Family acts silent scene (waking, breakfast). Child directs.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold paper with scene numbers. Child points to each person.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fold paper in half. Paint one side. You press.
subtasks.how_they_help: Open together. Both point to mirror image.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child builds left half tower. Sibling mirrors right.
subtasks.how_they_help: You check. Point to mismatch. Sibling fixes.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws left half face. You draw right half.
subtasks.how_they_help: Compare. Child thumbs up/down.

subtasks.what_to_do: Write name backward. Hold to mirror. Family reads correct.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each signs child's name.

subtasks.what_to_do: Each folds paper twice, cuts shapes. Unfold.
subtasks.how_they_help: Compare snowflakes. Child points to matching sides.

subtasks.what_to_do: Line on tray. Child 3 pebbles left. You mirror right.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child checks. Thumbs up or fixes.

subtasks.what_to_do: Stand facing. Raise right hand. Child raises left. Swap.
subtasks.how_they_help: Laugh when wrong. Try again.

subtasks.what_to_do: Each finds one symmetrical object. Child collects.
subtasks.how_they_help: Walk together. Child points. You nod.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fold paper. Draw half monster on fold. Open.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each suggests name (writes). Child picks best.

subtasks.what_to_do: Two mirrors/lids facing 90°. Small toy between.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each counts visible toys. Child writes number.

cannot_hear_nor_speak.main_task_name: Sunday: Feel the Beat – Family Vibration

subtasks.what_to_do: Metal pot on table. Each puts hand on table.
subtasks.how_they_help: Take turns. Child points to strongest shake.

subtasks.what_to_do: Plastic wrap over bowl. Rice on top. Tap from below.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child watches whose tap makes rice jump highest.

subtasks.what_to_do: Rubber bands over shoebox. Each plucks.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child points to whose finger sees most shake.

subtasks.what_to_do: Two cups with string. Two pull tight. Third plucks.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child feels cup. Family rotates roles.

subtasks.what_to_do: You tap: tap,tap,pause,tap. Child copies. Child leads.
subtasks.how_they_help: Family takes turns leading. All watch hands.

subtasks.what_to_do: 3 glasses different water. Each taps.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child points to biggest ripple.

subtasks.what_to_do: Balloon. Hold to cheek humming. Then child's cheek.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child points to who smiled first.

subtasks.what_to_do: Each picks item (spoon, pan, bowl). Taps and feels.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws. Family looks together.

subtasks.what_to_do: Metal spoon and plastic spoon. Each taps both.
subtasks.how_they_help: Family points to longer shake. Child writes winner.

subtasks.what_to_do: Large pot on floor. Family stands barefoot circle.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each invents dance move for strong beat. Child copies all.
